title: Arm in Pole Position for AI: Liontrust's Pleydell-Bouverie
summary: Arm's move to sell its own chips has been largely cheered by investors. One of those investors supportive of the plan is Clare Pleydell-Bouverie, Fund Manager at Liontrust. Liontrust's top tech investments include Nvidia, Broadcom and TSMC. She spoke to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie on Bloomberg Tech: Europe.

title: TSMC revenue surges 35% on AI chip demand
summary:
STORY: :: TSMC

The world's largest contract chipmaker, TSMC, saw first-quarter revenue surge 35% thanks to the AI boom. 

Revenue from January-March hit $35.7 billion, beating market forecasts on surging interest in artificial intelligence applications.

Friday's results are in line with TSMC's January guidance of up to to $35.8 billion on its last earnings call.
